blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Cannot test 'no sources found' scenario without removing real ~/.openclaw and ~/.hermes configs. Mission worker blocked rm commands on real user files. Code inspection confirms correct behavior (lines 1806-1811: prints error listing all checked paths, exits with code 1).

appliedUpdates.description: Created initial user-testing.md with validation surface (CLI terminal script, tuistory tool) and concurrency limits (max 5)
Note: mission worker cannot rm/mv real user home directory files, blocking tests requiring source config removal

testingNotes.environment: macOS darwin 25.4.0, 32GB RAM. Real source configs exist at ~/.openclaw/ and ~/.hermes/. Test fixtures created at ~/.config/clawdbot/ and ~/.moltbot/ for source detection tests.
testingNotes.isolationStrategy: Used --target-workspace and --target-env with temp directories for all output. Source detection tests used existing real configs plus temporarily created test configs.
blockedTests: VAL-SRC-006: requires removing all source configs which mission worker cannot do
testingNotes.subagentIssue: user-testing-flow-validator subagents failed to spawn due to invalid model configuration (GLM-5-Turbo-[Z.AI]-2 not found). All tests executed directly by the validator instead.
